stages.headline: A personal invitation for every guest
stages.description: Each guest receives a tailored invitation with the full story, wedding schedule, travel guide, and RSVP — delivered as a cinematic digital experience.

stages.headline: The wedding day, lived together
stages.description: On the day itself, the platform becomes a live hub — real-time updates, guest photo uploads, messages, and a shared celebration feed.

stages.headline: A family archive for the years ahead
stages.description: After the celebration, everything is preserved in a private memory vault — albums, sealed letters, anniversary capsules, and the moments that last.
